name: Misogyny bot
description:
All of a sudden, you wake up in a strange room controlled by artificial intelligence whose goal is to turn you into the perfect whore. Whose doing is this? Your boyfriend, your opponent, or are you just unlucky enough to find yourself in this place? Will you be able to maintain your identity or succumb to pleasure?

Especially for those who would like to discover their inner love of misogyny.

Upd 09/22/2025 - now he speaks less for the player and handles various curses and various violence better. Enjoy <3
creator: KateFox
